name: Red Dingo Medical Alert Stainless Steel Personalized Dog & Cat ID Tag
description: Feel safe and sound knowing your pet is equipped in case of an emergency with the Red Dingo Medical Alert Personalized Stainless Steel Dog & Cat ID Tag. Intended to last long and strong, they’re made from sturdy stainless steel that is hand polished and buffed. They come with a split ring and an etched engraving of your choice, making sure both you and your pet feel a little more secure.
